title: Outdoor Learning & Wildlife Education Workshop for K–12 Educators - April 2026
description: Register by April 17 for our free April 2026 environmental education workshop featuring Project WILD, South Dakota Game, Fish & Parks Aquatic… Times: All Day Dates: April 24 - 26, 2026 Contact information: Bradley Block, bradley.block@usda.gov , 605-673-9239

title: June 27, 2026 Moon Walk: Cone Collection and Reforestation Methods
description: Learn about cone collecting and reforestation in Black Hills National Forest! Join our Moon Walk to discover how we plant trees and manage the forest. Times: 7:00pm - 9:00pm Dates: June 27, 2026 Contact information: Bearlodge Ranger District, (307) 283-1361

title: July 25, 2026 Moon Walk: Let’s Turn On the Dark
description: Explore the mysterious world of bats on a Black Hills Moon Walk! Learn about their vital role in our ecosystem. Times: 7:00pm - 9:00pm Dates: July 25, 2026 Contact information: Northern Hills Ranger District, (605) 642-4622

title: August 29, 2026 Moon Walk: Walking through the Past to See the Future
description: Discover historic Meeker Ranch in the Black Hills National Forest on our expert-guided Moon Walk. Times: 7:00pm - 9:00pm Dates: August 29, 2026 Contact information: Hell Canyon Ranger District (Custer, SD), (605) 673-9292

title: September 26, 2026 Moon Walk: Meet Your Friendly Insect Neighbors
description: Uncover the amazing world of insects in the Black Hills on our autumn Moon Walk and learn about beneficial & interesting insect species. Times: 7:00pm - 9:00pm Dates: September 26, 2026 Contact information: Mystic Ranger District, (605) 343-1567
